allow: Bash(sleep 20 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8081 2>&1; echo ""; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5173 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 30 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8081 2>&1; echo " \(backend\)"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5173 2>&1; echo " \(frontend\)")
Bash(cd d:/xm/WeBlog/weblog-springboot && ls -la weblog-web/target/*.jar 2>/dev/null || echo "No jar found, need to build first")

sleep 60
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8081)
